import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for p in parts
    match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for n in nums
  if n > t
    if first
      out = "#{n}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{n}"
    end
  end
end
println(out)
